intro.text: A method has been developed by the pathfinder Pujyashri so that Shravaks can also learn Sanskrit easily. It is hard to believe, but it is a reality that in the 'Two days a week' Sanshiv project by Adhyatm Parivar, today the Sanskrit education of many Shravaks and Shravikas in Mumbai is heading towards completion.
intro.highlight: This Gyan Yajna has been going on continuously for two years and will continue in the future.

suddhPujaDravya.metaTitle: Suddh Puja Dravya Samprapti | Adhyatm Vibhag

stats.label: Total Value of Materials purchased by Devotees

intro.title: Adhyatm Parivar presents Puja materials that will please the devotees of the Lord!

gauseershChandan.title: Gauseersh Chandan
gauseershChandan.desc: Among all sandalwood in the world, the best is the sandalwood of the 'Gauseersh' tree, which grows on the scripture-described Malayachal mountain. License holder Adhyatm Parivar takes sandalwood from the Government Auction out of 16 varieties, which has the most oil and is certified by a report to have the best quality oil. After this, its lab testing is done using IS and GCMS methods.

chandanKaTel.title: Sandalwood Oil
chandanKaTel.desc: The main thing to test regarding sandalwood is sandalwood oil. Adhyatm Parivar has made available the best of the best sandalwood oil for coating.

vasachoorna.title: Vasachoorna
vasachoorna.desc: This is the best Vasachoorna of Gauseersh Chandan itself. This Vasachoorna is also lab tested by IS and GCMS methods.

orisaya.title: Orisaya
orisaya.desc: The first useful instrument for worshiping with Svadravya. Different sizes of Orisayas are available for rubbing saffron sandalwood, etc.

kesar.title: Kesar (Saffron)
kesar.desc: It is mentioned in the scriptures to use musk, which is hotter than saffron, in the worship of the Lord. So where does the question arise in saffron? The report of ASI is also the same that: Aras is damaged by moisture, not by saffron. Therefore presented: Pure saffron tested by 12 types of reports!

gandhakashaayiVastra.title: Gandhakashaayi Vastra
gandhakashaayiVastra.desc: This is a 500 count Bengali cloth - Dhaka muslin for wiping the Lord's body. While wiping with this cloth, the memory of Janmabhishek done by Saudharmendra will come!

yakshaKardamChoorna.title: Yaksha Kardam Choorna
yakshaKardamChoorna.desc: This powder made from a mixture of Gauseersh Chandan, Kesar etc. gets ready by rubbing in a short time. In this way, saffron for Lord's worship gets ready quickly!

soneChandiKaBarak.title: Gold-Silver Leaf (Varakh)
soneChandiKaBarak.desc: The specialty of this leaf is: its thickness due to which more Nirmalya comes off. As a result, Devdravya is preserved. Devotees knowledgeable about leaf can clearly understand about the weight and 100% purity of Adhyatm Parivar's leaf. Example: Where elsewhere leaf of 7 grams weight is available for ₹700, Adhyatm Parivar's leaf of 20 grams weight is available for ₹1900. As a result, there is a saving of 25 to 30% material. Before making every lot available, the leaf is checked.

soneKaBadla.title: Gold Badla - Silver Badla
soneKaBadla.desc: Gold Badla with a mixture of 7 grams of gold (999) with 1 kg of silver (999) and Silver Badla of silver (999) are rarely found in the entire Jain rule.

bheemsetiKapoor.title: Bheemseti Camphor
bheemsetiKapoor.desc: This Bheemseti (Baras) camphor is the best variety of camphor. It is found only abroad and is obtained from rare trees. Ghanasar camphor is also a substance obtained from vegetation. According to the scriptures, such camphor should be mixed in saffron for worship. This makes the saffron thick, and due to its antifungal properties, there is no problem of fungus and pits in the idol. Special: 'Synthetic Camphor' made by Germany during the First World War is mostly being found everywhere at present. It is impure. Pure camphor could not be found in India.

cta.text: Contact for information about your nearest pure Puja Dravya collection center.

header.title: Uddhyapan Upkaran Vyavastha
header.subtitle: Identifying the proper place for instruments kept in Uddhyapans and organizing Uddhyapan according to the need of instruments

intro.p1: Through many supports like Updhan, various penances, etc., worshipers perform Uddhyapan (Ujamana) of instruments of Ratnatrayi. After that, there should be such an arrangement for those instruments that they reach where needed and become useful in the worship of Chaturvidh Sangh. If this is not possible, then those instruments remain lying in some place.
intro.p2: Adhyatm Parivar has become a 'bridge' for such arrangement due to its expansion. So far, such instruments have been delivered to about 70 Sanghs by the family.

cta.text: Contact for cooperation in organizing Uddhyapan and providing instruments.

stats.label: Number of rivers of water collected so far
Number of pilgrimages of collected soil

header.title: Uttam Bhaktidrivya Sanshodhan
header.subtitle: Deep research of materials, medicines etc. required in Lord's worship

intro.text: This is a project in which research enthusiasts of Adhyatm Parivar give hundreds of hours, travel thousands of kilometers, oh, roam inside the forest with the permission of the forest department and do hard work like Samudra Manthan and finally when the result like 'Amrit' is obtained, then there is a feeling of success of hard work. There are many such things worth knowing....

uttamBhaktidrivya.documentCaption: With the influence of Prabhu Shashan, when the permission to obtain medicine from all the forests of the country was received by the Central Government of India, the enthusiasm of Adhyatm Parivar increased 100 times.

abhishek.title: Abhishek Medicine...
abhishek.desc: If you see the price of a medicine like Triphala for medicine and see the price of a whole packet of 18 Abhishek, then the doubt remains whether there is real medicine in this packet? That is why Adhyatm Parivar has started efforts for pure medicines. Along with this, soil of various pilgrimages and water of rivers are also being collected.

header.title: Vihar Suraksha
header.subtitle: Task of sending staff across India for the security of Shramanivaryas during Vihar

intro.text: Describing the types of devotion to Shramanikshetra in Yoga Shastra scripture, Kalikal Sarvagya Shri says that:
intro.highlight: Shravak should protect the Shramani class from wicked and evil people.
intro.text2: Adhyatm Parivar is dedicated to the devotion of seven fields. Through this work, Adhyatm Parivar is getting the benefit of ensuring the safety of ascetics and freedom from worries about money etc.

captions.left: Trained to stay together in Vihar, this staff becomes instrumental in the peace of Sadhviji Bhagwants.
captions.right: Whether the Vihar is from Mumbai to Bengaluru or Ahmedabad to Chennai, proper arrangements are made as soon as Adhyatm Parivar receives the message!

header.title: Management of Various Sanghs - Aradhana Bhavans

intro.text: So that worshipers continue to get the support of the place of worship for the whole twelve months at various places, therefore Adhyatm Parivar is constructing and managing many Sanghs and Shravika Aradhana Bhavans.
